rationale: Bumped from 120 to 121 on 2026-07-02: adds tools/cite_export.py (net +1 tool), which exports findings/citations to BibTeX and RIS for eval 04. Per the measurement-first rule, growing the toolkit requires bumping this budget in the same change and naming, in the CHANGELOG entry, the eval the new tool moves; doctor check [9] enforces tools/*.py count <= budget.
